plugins.name: datell-visual-report-preview
plugins.description: Create Datell visual reports, dashboards, KPI pages, and no-MCP standalone HTML through the frontend-design-report repository. Prefer datell_generate_chart when MCP is available and fall back to self-contained HTML when it is not.

plugins.name: frontend-design-report
plugins.description: Search and install alias for frontend-design-report. Use it for Datell-style visual reports, dashboards, KPI summaries, and standalone HTML report generation with or without MCP.
